title: What is an addict? Hunter Biden fights over meaning as gun trial looms
shortDescription: The president’s son is charged with lying on a federal form and to a gun dealer about whether he was addicted to drugs when he bought a pistol in 2018.

title: Orchids, short ribs, Obama cameo: Takeaways from Biden's Kenya state dinner
shortDescription: Ruto’s trip is the first state visit by a Kenyan president to the United States in two decades and the first by an African leader since 2008.

title: Trump makes play to win over Democratic votes in Bronx rally
shortDescription: Trump's campaign rally in the Bronx tried to appeal to city-dwellers with promises such as making the subway beautiful again, avoiding other issues.

title: Biden, Kenyan president discuss Haiti conflict
shortDescription: During a press conference with Kenyan President William Ruto, President Joe Biden denied he was dragging the African country into the Haiti conflict.

title: Biden defends decision to ask Kenya for help fighting Haitian gangs
shortDescription: President Joe Biden denied that he was pulling Kenya into the Haiti crisis at a White House news conference that centered on the Caribbean island.

title: Ohio governor orders lawmakers back to get Biden on ballot
shortDescription: Gov. Mike DeWine calls it "unacceptable, "ridiculous" and "absurd" that lawmakers haven't found a solution to get the sitting president on the Ohio ballot.

title: OnPolitics: Trump's VP selection process takes to informal lobbying
shortDescription: Donald Trump's search for a new running mate in 2024 has been freewheeling and informal so far.

title: Louisiana man indicted for robocalls imitating President Biden's voice
shortDescription: The Democratic political consultant, Steven Kramer, says he wanted to call attention to dangers of artificial intelligence like robocalls in politics

title: Another DEI crackdown: UNC board votes to dismantle diversity programs
shortDescription: The UNC Board of Governors adopted a policy May 23 to require institutional neutrality and eliminate funding for DEI efforts.

title: Not an animal in a zoo, here's what Trump means by 'RINO'
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump has touted the term 'RINO' and used it to knock down fellow GOP politicians, but what does it mean?

title: Cruz refuses to say whether he would accept 2024 election results
shortDescription: Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, did not say whether he would unconditionally accept the 2024 election results, regardless of the winner, in a new interview.

title: Supreme Court backs SC voter map, rejects criticism it is unfair to Black voters
shortDescription: At issue is a coastal South Carolina district currently held by Rep. Nancy Mace, one of the Republicans who voted to oust former Speaker Kevin McCarthy.
